name: Goodness Cookies
recipeInstructions: Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in honey, egg, and orange rind until smooth. Combine flour, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt; blend into creamed mixture. Stir in cereal, chips, almonds, and raisins. Drop small spoonfuls onto greased baking sheets. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool on a rack. Store in an airtight container. Makes about 4 dozen cookies.
